purpose: canonical identity table for Pokémon and form references used by all downstream entities

fields.name: pokemon_key
fields.description: Normalized cross-source identifier for one Pokémon/form record

fields.name: form_name
fields.description: Normalized form label; default form uses the base species name

fields.name: source_name
fields.description: Originating source for this identity record

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Source URL or endpoint the record was resolved from

fields.name: dataset_version
fields.description: Dataset version this row was published under
